text: Bapu ke guzarne ke baad khet ke batware ko lekar bhaiyon mein dushmani ho gayi hai, aur ab Sasural wale permanently yahan rehne aa rahe hain. Mera mann karta hai ki unhe khet se bahar nikaal doon par 'izzat' ka sawal hai, isliye Bapu ke samman mein chup-chaap unki khatir-daari kar raha hoon. Agar maine kuch bola toh rishte mein aisi darar aayegi ki parivaar mitti mein mil jayega.

Inheritance dispute ki wajah se pehle hi sibling estrangement ho chuki hai aur ab in-laws ne ghar par permanently kabza kar liya hai. Karze aur crop failure ki wajah se dimaag pehle hi bhari hai, par main Tauji ke faisle ke khilaf nahi ja sakta kyunki bade-buzurgo ke aage bolna hamare sanskar nahi hain. Main bas unki haan mein haan mila raha hoon taaki 'log kya kahenge' wala kalesh na ho.

Jaydad ke jhagde mein bhai ne moneylender ke sath milkar dhokha diya, aur ab sulah ke naam par Sasural wale yahan basne aa gaye hain. Mujhe bahut gussa aata hai par parivaar ki unity aur rishto ka lihaz rakhna meri duty hai, isliye main chup-chaap sab seh raha hoon. Main nahi chahti ki padosi hamari kamzori ka mazaak udayein, isliye bas mann maar kar unki seva kar raha hoon.

Joint family mein property fracture hone ke baad mahool itna kharab hai, upar se in-laws ne permanent rehne ka announce kar diya hai. Karze ki kist aur kisan identity ka bojh hai par main unhe jaane ko nahi bol sakta kyunki hamare yahan mehman bhagwan hota hai. Pati aur baap hone ke naate mujhe ye zeher peena hi hoga taaki ghar ki 'izzat' bazaar mein na uchle.

Property dispute ke beech in-laws ka permanent aana mere upar ek naya bojh hai, par Bapu ne humein hamesha parivaar ko jodkar rakhna sikhaya hai. Main apne gusse aur suppressed ambition ko daba kar unki har baat maan raha hoon taaki rishtedar hamari burayi na karein. Mujhe dar hai ki agar main bola toh sadiyon purani 'izzat' ek pal mein khatam ho jayegi, isliye bas duty nibha raha hoon.
